description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The facade is characterized by a combination of dark and light horizontal bands, with large windows and a prominent entryway. There is a visible upper-level terrace with a pergola, as well as a ground-level garden area partially enclosed by fencing. The rear and side elevations show minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy, while the front is more open and inviting. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with some wooden accents on the terrace and entry. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a mix of concrete, glass, and metal, featuring a terrace, large windows, and a sleek, horizontal facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, terrace with pergola, and garden area.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal window openings, solid wall surfaces, and a glimpse of the terrace structure.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the horizontal banding, back entrance, and a more private, enclosed design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with solid walls, limited fenestration, and a clear view of the terrace and garden layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and side windows
